[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1000000 1
4 0000010 1
5 0101100 3
6 0010001 2
7 1011100 4

01 10 1000010 2
12 21 0101110 4
23 32 0111101 5 match 0
34 43 1011101 5
45 54 1111101 6
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111101 6

02 20 1101100 4
13 31 0010011 3
24 42 1111100 5
35 53 0110101 4
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 0111101 5 match 0
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 0111111 6

03 30 1010001 3
14 41 1011110 5
25 52 0101101 4
36 63 1111011 6
47 74 1111101 6
50 05 1100101 4
61 16 1111011 6
72 27 0111101 5 match 0

04 40 1011100 4 match 7
15 51 0100111 4
26 62 1111111 a
37 73 0111101 5 match 0
